zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop:
将该作物种植于此。多人合作会降低该指令对每人的消耗
NPC不会执行该指令，必须由玩家亲自起头
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_begin_1: $doer.firstname$拿起$name$幼苗，小心地将其放入育苗盆中，并覆盖上土壤。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_begin_2: $doer.firstname$在育苗架上摆放好一个个育苗盆，开始了新一批$name$的种植。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_begin_3: $doer.firstname$在室内种植区，精心挑选着健康的$name$幼苗，并按照规划进行种植。
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat:
将该生物养育于此。多人合作会降低该指令对每人的消耗
NPC不会执行该指令，必须由玩家亲自起头
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat_begin_1: $doer.firstname$提着饲料，走到饲养区域，开始给圈养的$name$进行喂食
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat_begin_2: $doer.firstname$仔细检查着养殖环境，清理粪便，更换饮水，确保$name$健康生长
zh-cn.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat_begin_3: $doer.firstname$按照规定，将营养液添加到饲料中，为圈养的$name$提供生长所需的营养
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning:
只有房间内有%%tag_trash%%时才可以执行，指令结束时移除房间内的%%tag_trash%%道具

NPC在日常生活中会自发打扫当前房间和自身的卧室
如需打扫公共场所，请单独安排NPC进行%%com_job_cleaning_displayName_1%%工作
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ 拿起抹布和清洁剂，开始擦拭房间里的各个角落
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ 推出了吸尘器，开始仔细地清理房间的地面
zh-cn.com_job_cleaning_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ 拿起除尘掸，掸去家具上的灰尘，然后用清洁剂擦拭表面
zh-cn.com_job_production_chemistry_begin_1: $doer.firstname$戴上防护眼镜，小心翼翼地将各种试剂混合在一起，开始了配制。
zh-cn.com_job_production_chemistry_begin_2: $doer.firstname$在实验台前忙碌着，精密地控制着各种仪器，开始了精细的制作。
zh-cn.com_job_production_chemistry_begin_3: $doer.firstname$将各种原料放入容器，仔细地调整着温度和时间，开始了漫长的制作过程。
zh-cn.com_job_training_shooting_begin_1: $doer.firstname$站到射击位置，戴上耳罩，举起手中的武器，开始了今天的训练
zh-cn.com_job_training_shooting_begin_2: $doer.firstname$调整呼吸，瞄准靶心，扣动扳机，开始了精准射击的练习
zh-cn.com_job_training_shooting_begin_3: $doer.firstname$在射击场上，反复练习着各种射击姿势，提高自己的射击水平
zh-cn.com_job_training_melee_begin_1: $doer.firstname$站在训练场中央，深吸一口气，摆出格斗姿势，开始了今天的近身格斗训练
zh-cn.com_job_training_melee_begin_2: $doer.firstname$反复练习着各种进攻和防御的动作，提升自己的格斗能力
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain: 每天一次，打理种植于此的作物。该指令与种植不同，可以由NPC来负责每日维护
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_begin_1: $doer.firstname$拎起水桶，细心地为田地里的作物浇水，确保它们能茁壮成长
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_begin_2: $doer.firstname$弯下腰，仔细地巡视着每一株植物，清除掉那些有害的杂草和虫子
zh-cn.com_job_farm_maintain_begin_3: $doer.firstname$在田地里忙碌着，修剪枝叶，松动土壤，为农作物的生长创造良好的环境
zh-cn.com_job_farm_remove: 移除种植于此处的作物

en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop:
Plant the crop here. Multiplayer cooperation reduces the cost for each person.
NPCs will not execute this command; it must be initiated by the player.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat:
Raise the creature here. Multiplayer cooperation reduces the cost for each person.
NPCs will not execute this command; it must be initiated by the player.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain: Once a day, tend to the crops planted here. Unlike planting, this command can be handled by NPCs for daily maintenance.
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ picked up the $name$ seedling, carefully placed it into the seedling pot, and covered it with soil
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ arranged the seedling pots on the seedling rack, and began planting a new batch of $name$
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_crop_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ in the indoor growing area, carefully selected healthy $name$ seedlings and planted them according to the plan
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ carried the feed and walked to the raising area, starting to feed the enclosed $name$
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ carefully checked the breeding environment, cleaned up feces, changed the drinking water, and ensured that the $name$ grew healthily
en-us.com_job_farm_cultivate_meat_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ according to regulations, added nutrient solution to the feed, providing the enclosed $name$ with the nutrients needed for growth
en-us.com_job_cleaning:
Can only be executed when %%tag_trash%% is present in the room. Removes %%tag_trash%% items from the room upon completion.

NPCs will spontaneously clean their current room and their own bedroom in daily life.
To clean public areas, please schedule the NPC for %%com_job_cleaning_displayName_1%% work separately.
en-us.com_job_cleaning_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ picked up the rag and cleaning agent, and began to wipe every corner of the room
en-us.com_job_cleaning_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ rolled out the vacuum cleaner and began to carefully clean the floor of the room
en-us.com_job_cleaning_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ picked up the duster, dusted the furniture, and then wiped the surfaces with cleaning agent
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ began preparing the ingredients for the meal.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ turned on the stove, and began cooking
en-us.com_job_production_chemistry_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ put on protective goggles and carefully mixed various reagents together, beginning the preparation process.
en-us.com_job_production_chemistry_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ was busy at the lab bench, precisely controlling various instruments, beginning the delicate crafting process.
en-us.com_job_production_chemistry_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ placed various raw materials into a container, carefully adjusting the temperature and time, beginning the long crafting process.
en-us.com_job_training_shooting_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ stood at the firing position, put on ear protection, raised the weapon in their hand, and began today's training.
en-us.com_job_training_shooting_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ adjusted their breathing, aimed at the bullseye, pulled the trigger, and began practicing precision shooting.
en-us.com_job_training_shooting_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ repeatedly practiced various shooting stances on the shooting range to improve their shooting skills.
en-us.com_job_training_melee_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ stood in the center of the training ground, took a deep breath, adopted a fighting stance, and began today's close-quarters combat training.
en-us.com_job_training_melee_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ repeatedly practiced various offensive and defensive movements to improve their fighting ability.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ picked up the water bucket and carefully watered the crops in the field, ensuring they could grow strong and healthy.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_begin_2: $doer.firstname$ bent down and carefully inspected each plant, removing harmful weeds and bugs.
en-us.com_job_farm_maintain_begin_3: $doer.firstname$ was busy in the field, pruning branches and loosening the soil, creating a good environment for the growth of the crops.
en-us.com_job_farm_remove_begin_1: $doer.firstname$ starts removing target from the cultivation area.
